title: crepis nutans
intro: Crepis nutans, also known as the nodding hawk's beard, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Crepis nutans include its ability to help reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its roots and leaves can be used in various herbal preparations to harness its medicinal properties.
